title: hypericum perfoliatum subsp. heldreichii
intro: Hypericum perfoliatum subsp. heldreichii, also known as the Great St. John's Wort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Hypericaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Hypericum perfoliatum subsp. heldreichii include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and support wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
